stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the twenty-second of May, 2026
A quick fact to kick things off: today is National Maritime Day in the United States
On this date in 1819, the steamship Savannah became the first vessel to cross the Atlantic with the help of steam power
completing the voyage from Georgia to Liverpool in 29 days
She was mostly under sail, but that engine made the history books
Global shipping has not stopped reinventing itself since
NTUC First Campus has developed a new set of resources to help pre-school teachers support children with different learning and developmental needs
It is a quiet policy move, but an important one for early childhood inclusion in the sector
